articles.title: Israel told US of alleged Iranian plot to kill Trump
articles.summary: Israel told US of alleged Iranian plot to kill Trump Israel provided the US with new intelligence that indicated an Iranian plot to kill US President Donald Trump, according to the Wall Street Journal. When comments were requested, the newspaper was referred by the White House to remarks made by Trump on Wednesday, where he alluded to threats to his life.  "They want to take out the U.S. leader—me," he told reporters in Turkey's capital of Ankara. articles.summary: Israeli strikes, demolitions continue in Lebanon State media reported that an Israeli drone targeted a truck early on Friday in Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, resulting in the wounding of two people.  According to the National News Agency, the attack occurred while the truck was dumping waste on the outskirts of the towns of Choukin and Kfardjal. Meanwhile, demolition operations continued in southern Lebanon, with multiple blasts heard in Nabatieh's Khiam.

articles.title: Report: Hamas spokesperson survives Israeli air strike
articles.summary: Report: Hamas spokesperson survives Israeli air strike Hamas spokesperson Hazem Qassem reportedly survived an Israeli attack that occurred on Thursday west of Gaza City, according to Al Arabiya television. Based on a security source in the territory, one of the Israeli air strikes targeted the Hamas official's car. However, Qassem was not in the car at the time of the attack. His body guard was killed instead.  On Thursday, at least six people were killed by Israeli shelling across the blockaded enclave. articles.title: Iran's late supreme leader Khamenei buried in Mashdad
articles.summary: Iran's late supreme leader Khamenei buried in Mashdad Iran's slain Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been buried in his hometown of Mashdad following a week-long funeral procession, state media reported.  "Moments ago, following a week of magnificent funeral processions, the martyred leader Ayatollah Khamenei was laid to rest beside the shrine of Imam Reza in Mashhad," the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting indicated.  The coffin of Iran's late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on the day of his burial in Mashhad, 9 July, 2026 (Alkis Konstantinidis/Reuters)

articles.summary: US still committed to talks with Iran, official says A US official said on Thursday that Washington is still committed to finding a resolution with Iran and that technical talks are continuing amid renewed tensions between the countries, Reuters is reporting.
